message:
chore: sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-1m7x","title":"E2E scenario: ssh mode smoke (optional/manual)","description":"Optional E2E scenario for wish integration.

Constraints:
- This may be too heavy for default CI.

Plan:
- Generate/use a temp host key.
- Start `demo_showcase ssh` on localhost with an ephemeral port.
- Connect with an SSH client (or a minimal russh client) and ensure:
  - the server accepts a session
  - the UI renders at least one frame
  - a quit sequence cleanly closes the session

Logging:
- Capture server logs + client transcript to artifacts.

Acceptance:
- Provides high confidence that wish integration stays alive over time.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:31.040331959Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:33.585303389Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","e2e","ssh","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1m7x","depends_on_id":"bd-32ba","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:33.585268063Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1m7x","depends_on_id":"bd-3xs0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:32.328836611Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1m7x","depends_on_id":"bd-pfqw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:31.067983923Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1nwu","title":"Settings: toggles (mouse, animations, no-color, syntax)","description":"Expose runtime toggles:
- mouse on/off
- animations on/off
- force ASCII/no color
- syntax highlighting + line numbers (if enabled)

Implementation notes:
- This page should mutate the live app state, but also reflect the initial defaults from `demo_showcase::Config`.

Acceptance:
- Toggling updates app behavior live without restart.
- Toggles are discoverable and have immediate, visible effects (not hidden flags).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:12:01.250474646Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T16:56:54.222802995Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T16:56:54.222719740Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","settings"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1nwu","depends_on_id":"bd-274o","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:12:01.272885316Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1nwu","depends_on_id":"bd-2k35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:20:54.907924170Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1nwu","depends_on_id":"bd-2q95","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:28:38.554374326Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1nwu","depends_on_id":"bd-2szb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:21:00.214777601Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1nwu","depends_on_id":"bd-3s4n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:21:02.860339836Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1o6y","title":"Implement huh Multiselect, Text, FilePicker, Note field types","description":"Implement missing Huh field types: Multiselect, FilePicker, and Note. (Textarea is tracked separately under bd-212m.4.1.)

Scope:
- Add field structs + state for multiselect, filepicker, note in crates/huh/src/lib.rs.
- Implement update/view logic and keybindings consistent with Go.
- Add validation hooks and theming support for each field.
- Expand conformance fixtures and add unit tests for each field type.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Conformance fixtures for multiselect, text, filepicker, and note pass with no skips.
- Unit tests cover input handling, selection toggles, and rendering for each field.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated to reflect field coverage.","notes":"Textarea scope moved to bd-212m.4.1 to keep parity gap tracking focused.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:22.524453153Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:33:37.237925265Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T01:19:31.436260994Z","close_reason":"Implemented Text and FilePicker fields. MultiSelect and Note were already present. All field types have builder pattern, validation, keyboard handling, theme support, and view rendering.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-1oe0","title":"demo_showcase core: optionally use bubbletea derive macro for one model","description":"Optional showcase: use `bubbletea-macros` derive for *one* small model/component inside demo_showcase.

Why:
- It demonstrates that the workspace’s proc-macro ergonomics actually work in a real app.
- It also gives users a concrete reference for when the derive is worth using.

Scope:
- Pick a small, isolated model (examples):
  - a tiny counter widget in Settings/About
  - a modal state machine (open/close) with a few fields
- Do NOT macro-derive the entire App (keep core architecture explicit and readable).

Acceptance:
- The derived model compiles cleanly and behaves correctly.
- The code includes a brief doc comment explaining why derive was used here.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:14:52.572059183Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:27:58.105847511Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","demo_showcase","macros"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1oe0","depends_on_id":"bd-3j9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:14:52.588543294Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1oe0","depends_on_id":"bd-cakm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:30.485956680Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

  - a modal state machine (open/close) with a few fields
- Do NOT macro-derive the entire App (keep core architecture explicit and readable).

Acceptance:
- The derived model compiles cleanly and behaves correctly.
- The code includes a brief doc comment explaining why derive was used here.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:14:52.572059183Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:07:18.025550511Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","demo_showcase","macros"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1oe0","depends_on_id":"bd-3j9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:14:52.588543294Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1oe0","depends_on_id":"bd-cakm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:30.485956680Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1p61","title":"Unit tests: domain action API correctness","description":"Add comprehensive unit tests for the domain action API.

Coverage:
- start job -> job exists + correct initial state
- progress ticks update job correctly
- cancel job -> state transitions + logs/notifications
- retry failed job -> new attempt semantics
- deploy action -> deployment + job correlation

Logging:
- Tests should log action inputs + resulting state diffs for easy debugging.

Acceptance:
- The action API is covered with high confidence and runs fast.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:34:05.168723242Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T01:24:21.174597921Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T01:24:21.174533320Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1p61","depends_on_id":"bd-2zeq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:34:05.181377320Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1p61","depends_on_id":"bd-3pm6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:34:19.061233110Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1pdg","title":"Glow: truncate_string handles zero width","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T16:11:52.549379559Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T16:25:02.162307739Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T16:25:02.161950406Z","close_reason":"Completed: handle zero-width truncate_string; add tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1qwj","title":"demo_showcase core: notifications/toasts + status messages","description":"Add transient notifications and persistent status messaging.

Why:
- Real apps communicate state changes (saved, error, connected, job finished).

Implementation:
- Small toast stack or one-line status area.
- Uses lipgloss styles (success/warn/error) and optional harmonica animation later.

Acceptance:
- Pages can emit notifications via app messages; app renders them consistently.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:08:01.374394082Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:10:37.971622922Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T02:10:37.971559794Z","close_reason":"Implemented notification/toast system with Notification struct, NotificationMsg, and rendering in footer area.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","polish","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1qwj","depends_on_id":"bd-3j9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:08:01.402524089Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qwj","depends_on_id":"bd-7jxu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:25.545146309Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qwj","depends_on_id":"bd-ab35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:17:24.293003527Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1s7t","title":"E2E Tests: Logs page filtering and search","description":"End-to-end tests for the Logs page filtering and search functionality.

## Purpose
Test the log viewer with its filtering, level selection,
and search capabilities.

## Test Requirements

### Log Display
- [ ] Logs render with timestamps
- [ ] Log levels color-coded
- [ ] Long logs truncate/wrap correctly
- [ ] Syntax highlighting in log messages

### Level Filtering
- [ ] Filter by ERROR only
- [ ] Filter by WARN and above
- [ ] Filter by INFO and above
- [ ] Filter by DEBUG and above
- [ ] Filter by TRACE (all)

### Text Search
- [ ] Search filter input works
- [ ] Search highlights matches
- [ ] Search is case-insensitive
- [ ] Clear search shows all

### Navigation
- [ ] Scroll through log list
- [ ] Jump to top/bottom
- [ ] Page up/down
- [ ] Line numbers optional

### Real-time Updates
- [ ] New logs appear at bottom
- [ ] Auto-scroll when at bottom
- [ ] Stay position when scrolled up

## Logging Requirements
- [ ] Log filter changes
- [ ] Log search queries
- [ ] Log scroll position changes

## Success Criteria
- Filtering works correctly
- Search finds all matches
- Large log volumes perform well","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"DustyMeadow","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:55:21.701891676Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:54:29.341649848Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:54:29.341520717Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","e2e","logs","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1s7t","depends_on_id":"bd-1cgb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:55:21.720531569Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1s7t","depends_on_id":"bd-28kk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:57:10.316035449Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1s7t","depends_on_id":"bd-t1aq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:57:44.463158140Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-1tdh","title":"Jobs: paginator integration for long lists","description":"Add pagination for long Jobs lists using `bubbles::paginator`.

Why:
- Long lists are a common real-world case; pagination prevents the UI from becoming sluggish.
- It also showcases another Bubbles component in a realistic workflow.

Behavior:
- Paginator reflects total pages and current page.
- Works correctly with filtering/sorting:
  - applying a filter updates total pages
  - selection remains stable (best-effort) when the filtered set changes
- Keyboard:
  - next/prev page shortcuts
  - jump to first/last (optional)

Acceptance:
- Large job sets remain responsive.
- Pagination UX feels consistent with the rest of the app (styled, discoverable).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:14:21.084401297Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:28:43.856579389Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","jobs","paginator"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1tdh","depends_on_id":"bd-1dr6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:14:21.103425435Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1tdh","depends_on_id":"bd-3rwl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:19:02.336132860Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1u1s","title":"Unit Tests: bubbletea core (Cmd, Message, Model)","description":"Add comprehensive unit tests for bubbletea core functionality.

## Current State
bubbletea has basic tests but gaps in:
- Cmd::batch and Cmd::sequence edge cases
- Message type coercion and downcasting
- Model trait default implementations

## Test Requirements

### Cmd Module
- [ ] Cmd::new() with various closure types
- [ ] Cmd::batch() with empty, single, multiple commands
- [ ] Cmd::sequence() ordering guarantees
- [ ] Cmd::blocking() thread behavior
- [ ] Cmd cancellation (if supported)

### Message Module
- [ ] Message::new() with all message types
- [ ] Message::is::<T>() type checking
- [ ] Message::downcast::<T>() success/failure
- [ ] Message cloning and equality

### Key/Mouse Events
- [ ] KeyEvent parsing from raw bytes
- [ ] MouseEvent coordinate handling
- [ ] Modifier key combinations
- [ ] Special keys (F1-F12, arrows, etc.)

## Success Criteria
- 100% coverage of public Cmd API
- 100% coverage of Message API
- All edge cases documented with tests","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WindyLantern","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:51:21.686576405Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T20:25:54.673408772Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T20:25:54.673341717Z","close_reason":"Added 24 comprehensive unit tests for bubbletea core: Cmd (batch/sequence edge cases, new_optional, blocking, captured values), Message (downcast_ref, Debug format, all built-in types, equality/clone/copy traits). Tests verify 1-command optimization in batch/sequence.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","testing","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1u1s","depends_on_id":"bd-28co","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:51:21.715496013Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1wtl","title":"Files: preview pane (viewport)","description":"Add a preview pane for the selected file using `bubbles::viewport`.

Why:
- Makes the Files page feel like a real tool (inspect configs/logs/docs quickly).
- Exercises viewport scrolling + resize behavior.

Preview behavior:
- For plain text:
  - show a bounded preview (first N lines/bytes) with a "truncated" indicator
  - choose a clear wrapping strategy (wrap-by-default is fine; optionally support horizontal scroll)
- Show lightweight metadata (optional but nice):
  - file size, last modified, detected type (text/markdown/binary)
- Resize handling:
  - preview reflows correctly on window resize

Acceptance:
- Large files do not lock up the UI; preview work is bounded.
- Scrolling the preview is smooth and does not interfere with file picker navigation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:11:19.317694097Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T05:11:21.579944103Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T05:11:21.579876477Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","files","viewport"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1wtl","depends_on_id":"bd-201t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:11:19.337282014Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wtl","depends_on_id":"bd-fdf3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:20:14.307425706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1x3q","title":"Jobs: start/cancel/retry actions via Cmd/AsyncCmd","description":"Make jobs interactive.

Implement actions:
- Start a new job (creates a job + progress updates)
- Cancel job
- Retry failed job

Implementation notes:
- Use the shared domain action API (`demo_showcase data: action API …`) so UI code stays thin.
- bubbletea `Cmd` for sync simulation.
- bubbletea `AsyncCmd` when async feature enabled.

Acceptance:
- Actions produce toasts and update other pages (dashboard/logs).
- Action layer is unit tested independently of the UI.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:10:20.940826293Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:24:13.108786778Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:24:13.108709945Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","demo_showcase","jobs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1x3q","depends_on_id":"bd-1dr6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:10:20.955289813Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1x3q","depends_on_id":"bd-3pm6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:30:38.522320902Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1x3q","depends_on_id":"bd-3rwl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:18:46.346531972Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1x3q","depends_on_id":"bd-y3c8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:18:49.013962965Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
